ch: 我的好朋友叫’Esai，他也是魯凱族的小孩。
en: My good friend’s name is ’Esai, and he is also an Rukai child.
We study together in the ’Oponoho tribe.

ab: osilalalranai takaarodhange lo lomoamolailidha, la kalrihilinai ’ako’Oponohae.
ch: 我們常常一起聽耆老說故事，我們都很會說萬山話。
en: We often listen to the elders telling stories together, and we both can speak the ’Oponohae proficiently.

ab: maka’anahalrelrao la kavotolro’o, ’Esai ’a maka’analeve la karilai.
ch: 我很高也很胖，’Esai很矮也很瘦。
en: I am tall and overweight, while ’Esai is short and thin.
’Esai is very energetic, and everyone likes him a lot.
